overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a historic American city resembling 1890s New Orleans. The character walks through wooden balconies, covered walkways, interior courtyards, and muddy streets with horse-drawn carriages and period architecture under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden balcony and covered walkway of historic buildings

events.description: enters covered walkway from open balcony area, reducing natural light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden balcony and entering covered walkway between buildings

entered.detail: weathered wooden railings of elevated porch walkway
red brick exterior walls with wooden shutters
rope clothesline strung between wooden posts
green leafy tree visible above the buildings
wooden plank ceiling of covered passage

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a wooden balcony of a historic building, walking along weathered planks with brick walls on one side and wooden railings on the other. A clothesline stretches across the view as the character enters a darker covered walkway between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with fountain and arched passage

events.description: exits covered walkway into open courtyard with central fountain
enters dark arched tunnel passage, significantly reducing visibility
exits tunnel into bright outdoor alley

agents.ego_description: walking through courtyard, passing the fountain, and traversing the dark arched tunnel

notable_agents.action: woman in dress standing near the tunnel exit

entered.detail: octagonal stone fountain with water in courtyard center
brick archway tunnel connecting courtyard to exterior
tall brick walls enclosing the courtyard space
dark wooden door set in brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a brick-paved courtyard featuring a central stone fountain. Several NPCs are gathered near the fountain. The character then enters a dark arched brick tunnel, passing a woman standing near the exit, before emerging into daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy back alley with utility poles and wooden fences

agents.ego_description: walking down muddy back alley with wooden buildings on the left and stone wall on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in gray dress walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and wires
tall stone wall running along the right side of the alley
weathered two-story wooden houses with balconies
unpaved muddy street with puddles and wagon ruts

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the character walks down a muddy back alley flanked by wooden utility poles and a tall stone wall. Weathered wooden residential buildings line the left side. A woman walks ahead in the same direction as the character proceeds down the unpaved road.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with storefronts and horse traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along main commercial street as a horse-drawn carriage passes by

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horse moving along the street

entered.detail: ornate brick and stone commercial buildings with balconies
wooden awning extending over the sidewalk
black cast iron lamp post with glass enclosure
metal tram rails embedded in the muddy street

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wider main street with masonry commercial buildings and storefront awnings. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. The street features embedded tram tracks and cast iron street lamps. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the character proceeds toward an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with prominent corner building

events.description: begins crossing the muddy street toward the corner building
turns left around the corner of the Claymarket building

agents.ego_description: crossing the muddy intersection and turning left around the prominent corner building

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt and hat crossing the street

entered.detail: prominent three-story brick corner building with CLAYMARKET signage
row of brick commercial structures along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the muddy intersection toward a prominent three-story brick corner building with CLAYMARKET signage. The sun backlights the scene creating a hazy atmosphere. After crossing, the character turns left around the corner, passing a man in a blue shirt, and continues down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the elevated wooden balconies of a historic building down into the muddy back alleys of the city. It begins with the character walking along weathered planks and brick walls past a stretching clothesline before transitioning into the shadows of a covered walkway. As the character emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a brick-paved courtyard centered around a stone fountain where several people are gathered, before the camera follows the character through a dark, arched brick tunnel. The view then shifts back into the daylight as the character exits the tunnel and proceeds down a muddy, unpaved road flanked by a tall stone wall and weathered residential buildings.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling commercial thoroughfare into a hazy, sun-drenched side street. It begins as the character enters a wide main street lined with masonry buildings and storefront awnings, passing a horse-drawn carriage and moving along embedded tram tracks and cast iron lamps. As the character proceeds toward an intersection, the scene shifts toward a muddy crossing where the sun backlights the environment, creating a thick, hazy atmosphere. The camera then follows the character across the street toward a prominent three-story brick building with Claymarket signage before turning left around the corner. Finally, the movement continues down the new street, passing a man in a blue shirt as the urban landscape unfolds.
